profile.education: Rutgers College (BA, History & Political Science); Rutgers Law School (JD)
profile.background: Attorney; worked in pharmaceutical policy and lobbying in Washington D.C.; West Virginia Attorney General (2013-2025); became 36th governor in January 2025.

profile.education: Duke University (BS Zoology), University of Virginia (MEd)
profile.background: Former West Virginia state legislator and U.S. House member. Daughter of three-term Governor Arch Moore. First woman elected to Senate from West Virginia. Former college counselor.
profile.office: 170 Russell Senate Office Building

profile.background: Billionaire coal and agriculture magnate and former Governor of West Virginia. Owner of The Greenbrier resort. Largest farmer east of the Mississippi. Switched from Democrat to Republican in 2017.
